head_commit.message:
refactor(ipv6): cleanup, fix used_ports leak, and address review feedback

Fix memory leak in release_port: when a port's socket count drops to
zero and no other ports remain for the address, remove the address
entry from used_ports. Also clean up formatting, remove noisy per-packet
warn in EtherIface, add IPV6_V6ONLY and IPv6-only interface design
notes, and use expect() with descriptive messages for unwrap() calls.

steps.name: Post Run integration tests with LTP
Post Run integration tests with LTP
